title: pavonia typhalaea
intro: Pavonia typhalaea, also known as Rock Rose or Rockmallow, is a plant species belonging to the mallow family, Malvaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Pavonia typhalaea is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used topically to treat skin conditions like eczema and acne.
